prompt: As part of a therapeutic development pipeline, engineer variants of Protease (PR) (retroviral aspartyl protease) from Human immunodeficiency virus type 1 with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. describe a computational strategy covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using AlphaFold2, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Please include key design considerations and expected challenges.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Protease (PR); organism: Human immunodeficiency virus type 1; catalogue version v1.0
